sentences.arabic: تَنَاوُلُ الْخُضْرَاوَاتِ وَالْفَوَاكِهِ يَوْمِيًّا يُقَوِّي جِهَازَ الْمَنَاعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svakodnevno konzumiranje povrća i voća jača imuni sistem.
sentences.translationEn: Eating vegetables and fruits daily strengthens the immune system.

sentences.arabic: تُحَضِّرُ أُمِّي دَائِمًا سَلَطَةً صِحِّيَّةً لِوَجْبَةِ الْغَدَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Moja majka uvijek priprema zdravu salatu za ručak.
sentences.translationEn: My mother always prepares a healthy salad for lunch.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا تَجَنُّبُ أَكْلِ السُّكَّرِ وَالْوَجَبَاتِ السَّرِيعَةِ بِكَثْرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Moramo izbjegavati prekomjerno konzumiranje šećera i brze hrane.
sentences.translationEn: We must avoid eating too much sugar and fast food.
